training_schedule.training_split: Upper/Lower split with 3 legs days (Mon, Wed, Fri)

injuries.description: Pain when performing lower back exercises. Avoid direct loading of lumbar spine under fatigue.
Occasional knee pain, not frequent. Monitor on high-impact or deep knee flexion movements.

health_conditions.notes: Iron deficiency confirmed. Prioritize iron-rich foods and absorption-friendly meal pairings (vitamin C with iron sources). Avoid calcium-heavy meals paired with iron-rich foods.

mandatory_meals.description: Mandatory daily lunch: ~150g cooked rice + 100g cooked beans + protein source
mandatory_meals.notes: Rice and beans together provide a complete amino acid profile and are a cultural non-negotiable. Protein source to be varied (chicken breast preferred).

constraints.note: Occasional knee pain reported during discovery. 90-degree ROM cap implemented on all squat patterns
